eligibility_summary: SMB, pilot, or low-volume partners under $250k monthly volume; not recommended for high-risk partners.
Partners with $250k-$2M monthly volume or 5k-50k monthly transactions and acceptable risk.
Partners with $2M-$10M monthly volume, KYC approved, and stable chargeback performance.
Strategic or enterprise partners above $10M monthly volume; requires executive sponsor and review cadence.
Technology Platform or ISV partners with API/SDK integration, multiple merchants, or strong growth.
High-risk tier, gaming/travel concentration, or elevated chargeback exposure; reserve and review required.
Deprecated plan. Existing partners require review within 12 months and migration when commercially feasible.
Deprecated enterprise plan. Requires governance review and active exception record.
Temporary acquisition offer for growth-stage partners; review due within 180 days.
